toast.deviceNotFoundHost: No OpenCurtainLab found at this address.
toast.newWebUi: New Web UI available. Download the current HTML from the GitHub project.
toast.importFailed: Import failed: no valid JSON file
toast.csvExported: Camera summary CSV exported — {count} target times
toast.projectNameExists: A project with this name already exists
toast.noTargetTimesSelected: Select at least one target time
toast.customTimesInvalid: Invalid custom target times. Use positive numbers separated by commas.
toast.customTimesLoaded: Custom times loaded into the device
toast.customTimesLoadFailed: Custom times could not be loaded
toast.customTimesInvalidWithMax: Invalid custom target times. Use positive numbers up to 1/{max}, separated by commas.
toast.defaultProjectKept: The default project cannot be deleted
toast.measurementMovedToDefault: Measurement moved to the default project
toast.measurementAssignedToDefaultIncompatible: Measurement assigned to the default project because it does not match the selected project.

confirm.importBackup: Import backup JSON? Current projects and history will be replaced.
confirm.resetLocalData: Reset all local WebUI data? This removes projects, measurements and cached device settings.

empty.connectDeviceSub: Enter the device address in Settings or use opencurtainlab.local.
empty.createFirstProjectSub: Create a camera project to collect compatible measurements. Other measurements stay in the default project.
empty.noMeasurementsYetSub: Trigger the camera shutter. New measurements will appear automatically.
empty.selectMeasurementSub: Choose an entry from the history to inspect timing details.

charts.notEnoughCurtain: Not enough sensor points for curtain chart
charts.noCurtainMeasurements: No measurements with curtain speed data yet

project.fromSlitWidth: from slit width at each sensor
project.deleteProjectHelp: Deletes the project. Its measurements move to the default project.

settings.customTimesHelp: Comma-separated denominators up to 1/{max}. Leave empty to load the standard times.

quickStart.title: Quick start
quickStart.help: Measurements are received automatically after each shutter test.
steps: Set the target time on the device or in the Web UI.

connectionHelp.title: Could not connect to OpenCurtainLab
steps: Make sure the device is powered on.
Use opencurtainlab.local or the IP shown on the OLED.
Make sure this computer is on the same Wi-Fi network.
If setup mode is active, connect to the OpenCurtainLab Wi-Fi and open 192.168.4.1.

generic.action: Check the camera setup and repeat the measurement.

sensor_already_active_at_start.title: Sensor already active
sensor_already_active_at_start.body: A sensor was already covered when the device tried to arm the measurement.
sensor_already_active_at_start.action: Open the shutter path, check alignment, then try again.

flash_without_sensor.title: Flash without sensor coverage
flash_without_sensor.body: The flash input fired, but no phototransistor detected shutter movement.
flash_without_sensor.action: Check the flash sync cable, camera mode, and sensor alignment.

timeout_with_data.title: Measurement timed out
timeout_with_data.body: Some sensor data was captured, but the shutter sequence did not finish in time.
timeout_with_data.action: Check whether the shutter got stuck or the selected test setup is correct.

incomplete_sensor_coverage.title: Incomplete sensor coverage
incomplete_sensor_coverage.body: Not all five sensors were covered during this measurement.
incomplete_sensor_coverage.action: Check camera alignment, curtain travel, or whether the shutter slit covers the full sensor array.

generic.action: Check the device and reconnect when the problem is fixed.

sensor_baseline_too_low.title: Sensor baseline too low
sensor_baseline_too_low.body: The sensors do not receive enough light for reliable measurement.
sensor_baseline_too_low.action: Check the light source, sensor wiring, and whether a shutter blade covers the sensors.

network_access_point_failed.title: Setup access point failed
network_access_point_failed.body: The device could not start its setup Wi-Fi network.
network_access_point_failed.action: Restart the device. If this persists, reflash the firmware or check the ESP32 board.

display_init_failed.title: Display initialization failed
display_init_failed.body: The OLED display could not be initialized.
display_init_failed.action: Check the I2C wiring, display address, and power supply.

lamp_connector_miswired.title: Lamp connector error
lamp_connector_miswired.body: The lamp socket reports a wrong or shorted plug. The lamp output remains off.
lamp_connector_miswired.action: Use only the OpenCurtainLab lamp cable. Do not connect flash cables, headphones, audio equipment, or microphones to the lamp socket.

firmware.title: Version mismatch
firmware.warning: Firmware {actual} and Web UI {expected}.x may not match.
firmware.action: Use firmware, Web UI files and version.txt from the same release.

versions.title: version mismatch
versions.firmwareWebUiMismatch: Firmware {firmware} and Web UI {webui} do not match.
versions.webUiOutdated: This Web UI is outdated. Loaded {webui}, published {cdn}.
versions.cdnMismatch: The loaded Web UI {webui} and published version marker {cdn} do not match.
versions.deviceCdnMismatch: Firmware {firmware} and published project version {cdn} do not match.
versions.action: Use firmware, Web UI files and version.txt from the same release.
versions.mismatchAction: Use firmware and Web UI files from the same release.
versions.updateAction: Download the current Web UI files from the project release.

html.sensorToolsHint: Recalibrate the sensor baselines after changing lighting, covers, or the sensor board position.
html.localFileNoticeBody: This single-file Web UI works best when downloaded and opened as a local file.
